title: Create windowing.py — sliding window segmentation
acceptance_criteria: Accepts the resampled DataFrame from load_data.py as input
Creates sliding windows of 2.5 seconds (250 samples at 100 Hz) with 50% overlap (125-sample stride)
Output shape: (num_windows, num_channels) where num_channels = 9 (accel_x/y/z, gyro_x/y/z, lin_accel_x/y/z)
Each window is labeled with the corresponding exercise class
Handles edge cases (incomplete final window) by truncation or padding
